## Summary
`make fast-ci` **FAILED** with 2 test failures. Here are the full results:
### Prettier Check - 2 files have code style issues: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### Linting & Format Checks - `ty` (type checking): All checks passed - `ruff` (linting): All checks passed - Prettier format check: 1625 files already formatted
### Test Results
**erk package**: 2 failures out of 5467 tests
**Failed tests:**
1. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_create_learn_issue.py::test_returns_state_after_creating_pr`** - Location: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_create_learn_issue.py:123` - Error: `assert 0 == 1` (expected 1 created PR but got 0) - Stderr: `⚠️ No sessions discovered for this plan`
2. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py::test_creates_pr_and_shows_success`** - Location: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py:280` - Error: `assert 0 == 1` (expected 1 created PR but got 0) - Stderr: `⚠️ No sessions discovered for this plan`
**Other packages:** - erk-dev: 136 tests passed - erk-statusline: 112 tests passed - erkbot: 114 tests passed
Both failures relate to "no sessions discovered for this plan" and are specifically in the `land` command's learn PR creation functionality, where the test expects a PR to be created but none was created.
